manifest.name: Workflowy Sync

name: Workflowy Sync

releases.author: rodolfo-terriquez
releases.description:
Initial public release of Workflowy Sync for Obsidian.

Workflowy Sync connects Obsidian and Workflowy with three core workflows:

- Quick send from Obsidian to Workflowy
- Live Workflowy embeds inside Obsidian notes
- Sync mappings between a Workflowy item and an Obsidian note

## Features

- Send selected text, or the current line when nothing is selected, to Workflowy
- Use a saved default Workflowy target or choose a target on demand
- Optional Obsidian backlink in sent Workflowy items
- Embed a live Workflowy node or subtree with a `workflowy` code block
- Manual refresh for live embeds
- Workflowy -> Obsidian sync mappings
- Obsidian -> Workflowy sync mappings
- Manual sync, sync on app open, or scheduled sync intervals
- Sync into a managed block under a note heading instead of replacing the whole note
- Optional filtering of completed Workflowy items

## Notes

- Requires a Workflowy account and API key
- Uses Workflowy network APIs to send, embed, and sync content
- Reverse sync is designed for structured note content like bullets, todos, headings, and simple item notes
- Full bidirectional conflict-aware sync is not included yet
